learning_outcomes.statement: Explain the difference between the Consumer Price Index (CPI) and the GDP Deflator in terms of basket composition and scope of goods and services measured.
learning_outcomes.notes: Focus on contrasting fixed vs variable basket and consumer goods vs all domestic goods.

learning_outcomes.statement: Calculate the inflation rate using price changes from a fixed basket of goods and services as measured by the CPI.
learning_outcomes.notes: Use weighted average price changes to determine CPI inflation rate.

learning_outcomes.statement: Describe how inflation impacts household budgets, including effects on real income, savings, and borrowing costs.
learning_outcomes.notes: Include examples of increased expenses and erosion of purchasing power.

learning_outcomes.statement: Summarize the role of policy communication by central banks and governments in managing inflation expectations and influencing household and business economic decisions.
learning_outcomes.notes: Highlight communication effects on spending, borrowing, and economic stability.
